headline: DevvStream Announces $6 Million Equity Investment from EEME Energy; Gives Notice to Terminate $300 Million Equity Line of Credit
summary: CALGARY, Alberta, June 04, 2026--DevvStream Corp. (NASDAQ: DEVS) ("DevvStream" or the "Company") today announced that it has entered into a binding term sheet with EEME Energy SPV I, LLC ("EEME") for a $6.0 million private placement of the Company’s Series A Non-Redeemable Convertible Preferred Stock. EEME has already funded $1.5 million of the investment. The Company also announced that it has given notice to terminate its equity line of credit purchase agreement, under which up to $300 million
